description: Standing LLM eval battery for tools/llm/eval_turns.py. Keep prompts stable across runs so A/B comparisons stay meaningful; add new prompts at the END with new ids.

prompts.text: hello there, how are you today?
tell me one fun fact about the moon
how do I make my morning routine better?
which is better for focus, coffee or tea?
고래에 대한 재미있는 사실 하나 알려줘
잠을 잘 자려면 어떻게 해야 해?
what time is it right now?
how much battery do I have left?
